title: Guard discount ratio against zero totals
description: The change computes a ratio for the discount summary.
diff:
diff --git a/src/payments.py b/src/payments.py
index 1111111..2222222 100644
--- a/src/payments.py
+++ b/src/payments.py
@@ -10,4 +10,4 @@ def compute_discount_ratio(total, discount):
-    return 0
+    return discount / total
review_comments: If total can be zero here, this division can raise ZeroDivisionError. Please guard the zero-total case before computing the ratio.
follow_up: Added an early return when total is zero.

title: Return the first item summary
description: The endpoint now returns the first item name directly.
diff:
diff --git a/src/cart.py b/src/cart.py
index 1111111..2222222 100644
--- a/src/cart.py
+++ b/src/cart.py
@@ -4,4 +4,4 @@ def build_first_item_summary(items):
-    return ""
+    return items[0].name
review_comments: This assumes items is non-empty. If the cart can be empty, items[0] will fail; add a guard or default value.

title: Normalize email on sign-in
description: This change lowercases the email before comparison.
diff:
diff --git a/src/users.py b/src/users.py
index 1111111..2222222 100644
--- a/src/users.py
+++ b/src/users.py
@@ -7,4 +7,4 @@ def normalize_email(user):
-    return ""
+    return user.email.lower()
review_comments: user.email can be None for invited users, so calling .lower() here can raise. Consider normalizing only after a None check.
follow_up: Added a fallback for missing emails.

title: Reserve stock during checkout
description: The change updates stock counters while validating the order.
diff:
diff --git a/src/inventory.py b/src/inventory.py
index 1111111..2222222 100644
--- a/src/inventory.py
+++ b/src/inventory.py
@@ -12,5 +12,5 @@ def reserve_stock(stock, quantity):
-    if quantity > stock:
-        raise ValueError("not enough stock")
-    stock -= quantity
+    stock -= quantity
+    if quantity > stock:
+        raise ValueError("not enough stock")
     return stock
review_comments: Stock is decremented before verifying availability. If validation fails, inventory state becomes inconsistent; check availability first.
follow_up: Validation now runs before stock mutation.

title: Map internal state to label
description: The UI now reads the label from a dictionary directly.
diff:
diff --git a/src/status.py b/src/status.py
index 1111111..2222222 100644
--- a/src/status.py
+++ b/src/status.py
@@ -5,4 +5,4 @@ def render_status_label(state):
-    return STATUS_LABELS.get(state, "unknown")
+    return STATUS_LABELS[state]
review_comments: Direct indexing can raise KeyError for unexpected states. Keep the safe default or validate the state before looking it up.

title: Compute tax ratio for the invoice
description: The summary now exposes tax as a ratio of subtotal.
diff:
diff --git a/src/tax.py b/src/tax.py
index 1111111..2222222 100644
--- a/src/tax.py
+++ b/src/tax.py
@@ -8,4 +8,4 @@ def compute_tax_ratio(subtotal, tax):
-    return 0
+    return tax / subtotal
review_comments: If subtotal can be zero, this division can fail. Please guard the zero-subtotal case before computing the ratio.

title: Expose first SKU in the order summary
description: The API now returns the first SKU directly.
diff:
diff --git a/src/order_summary.py b/src/order_summary.py
index 1111111..2222222 100644
--- a/src/order_summary.py
+++ b/src/order_summary.py
@@ -5,4 +5,4 @@ def first_sku(line_items):
-    return ""
+    return line_items[0].sku
review_comments: This now assumes line_items is non-empty. If the order has no items, line_items[0] will raise; add a guard or fallback.

title: Reserve inventory for the shipment
description: The change decrements reserved count during shipment validation.
diff:
diff --git a/src/shipment.py b/src/shipment.py
index 1111111..2222222 100644
--- a/src/shipment.py
+++ b/src/shipment.py
@@ -9,5 +9,5 @@ def reserve_for_shipment(available, quantity):
-    if quantity > available:
-        raise ValueError("not enough inventory")
-    available -= quantity
+    available -= quantity
+    if quantity > available:
+        raise ValueError("not enough inventory")
     return available
review_comments: Availability should be checked before decrementing inventory, otherwise a rejected reservation can still mutate state.
